rootCause: Paradise dashboard mutations used credentialed cross-subdomain fetches but did not request or send the CSRF token required by the existing middleware.

fix.retry: One safe token refresh on csrf_required; no CSRF bypass.
fix.errorUi: Clean owner-facing toast; raw csrf_required is not shown as the primary message.

verification.localBrowserSave: PASS — branding saved through the CSRF-protected mutation helper
verification.liveProductionSave: PASS — template, branding, challenge, channel mappings, role mappings, operations, LOA, activity, relations, automation, roster and blacklist all saved without csrf_required
